title: clawsweeper自动审核Issue并创建PR
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Peter Steinberger 🦞
@steipete
Whenever you create an issue on one of oure open source projects, @ clawsweeper will review it, and *if* it fits the VISION.md file, will pick it up and create+autoreview a PR.
e.g.:
docs: document fields projection alias by clawsweeper[bot] · Pull Request #816 · openclaw/gogcli
From github.com
9:46 AM · Jun 15, 2026 30.7K Views
